creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Dmitry Petrov from comment #20)

(In reply to Dmitry Petrov from comment #20)

This is still an indication of a bug somewhere, either in the framework (USES=readline, in detecting readline in base else using ports), or in the Python build where the build/link against base vs ports may be conflicting

If anyone can reproduce this, please re-open the issue with additional details
